title: Up to 53% Off on Full Service(Inside and Out) Car Wash at Clean Wave Car Wash

faqs.question: What does the Full Service (Inside and Out) Car Wash at Clean Wave Car Wash include?
faqs.answer: The Full Service (Inside and Out) Car Wash at Clean Wave Car Wash covers both interior and exterior cleaning of the vehicle. The service is offered as the Manager Special, addressing the full vehicle from the inside out.

faqs.question: How many service options are available for the Clean Wave Car Wash Manager Special?
faqs.answer: There are two options available: One Full Service Manager Special (Clean Inside & Out) or Three Full Service Manager Specials (Clean Inside & Out). Both options provide the same full interior and exterior cleaning service.

faqs.question: Where is Clean Wave Car Wash located?
faqs.answer: Clean Wave Car Wash is located at 9960 Belvedere Road in the Breakers West area of Royal Palm Beach, FL 33411.

faqs.question: Is the Full Service (Inside and Out) Car Wash at Clean Wave Car Wash suitable for a multi-visit purchase?
faqs.answer: Yes, the deal includes an option for three Full Service Manager Specials, allowing customers to use the full interior and exterior cleaning service across multiple visits to Clean Wave Car Wash.

faqs.question: What type of automotive service does Clean Wave Car Wash specialize in?
faqs.answer: Clean Wave Car Wash specializes in auto cleaning services, specifically full service car washing that covers both the inside and outside of the vehicle.

faqs.question: Does Clean Wave Car Wash accept walk-in customers?
faqs.answer: Clean Wave operates as a walk-in car wash facility where customers can arrive without advance reservations. Visitors report being able to drive up and proceed through the service, with the process moving from the automated wash directly to the manual finishing and interior cleaning stations.

faqs.question: What is included in Clean Wave Car Wash's full service package?
faqs.answer: The full service package includes both exterior and interior cleaning, with the exterior washed by machine and the interior vacuumed and wiped down, including windows and all interior surfaces. Visitors consistently report that the service covers thorough attention to detail on both the outside and inside of the vehicle, with staff performing meticulous finishing work after the automated wash cycle.

faqs.question: How long does the full service car wash take at Clean Wave?
faqs.answer: The car wash process moves quickly through the automated system, with the finishing touches and interior cleaning adding additional time for a thorough result. Multiple visitors note that while there may be a brief wait for the drying and interior cleaning phase, the overall service is efficient and the final result justifies the time spent.

reviews.text:
The staff that vacuum and clean the inside of the car always does a great job.
They are also wipe down the outside of the car, clean the windows, seats, and all of the inside surfaces. I do appreciate the work they do and I tip them well for it. Read More
